quotes.selection: We will take back this world from humans.
general: We are the true humans. You sorcerers are the real curses.
The weak are destined to be consumed by the flames of the strong.
Our existence is proof of humanity's hatred, fear, and anger.
Humans cling to life, but deep down, they long for death.
Your life ends here, Jujutsu Sorcerer!
These flames will turn everything to ash!
Even if I die, curses will rise again and again.

20: Your arrogance blinds you, Gojo Satoru.
Mahio ID to be specified: Mahito, we are the next stage of evolution. Together, we'll create a new world.
21: Geto, you're the only human who understands us.

passive.name: Scorching Malice
passive.description: Jogo's basic attacks and damaging abilities apply Burn for 3 seconds, dealing magic damage equal to 2% of target's maximum health over 4 seconds. If Burn is reapplied, the duration refreshes up to 3 times.

h1.name: Fire Rocks Insects
h1.description: Jogo summons 7 fiery insect-like projectiles from his volcano-head that fly in a straight line, ignoring minions and small monsters. Upon detecting an enemy champion, each insect accelerates and explodes on contact for magic damage. Insects self-detonate if they don't hit anything after 3 seconds and can be destroyed individually.

projectiles.behavior: Straight line, ignores minions and small monsters

effects.destructible: Can be destroyed individually with AoE or targeted attacks

h2.name: Maximum Meteor
h2.description: After a 0.627 second delay, Jogo erupts a flaming meteor at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit.

h3.name: Volcanic Curse Technique
h3.description: Jogo attaches a visible Mini Volcano to any wall or vertical surface within range. The volcano grants sight of the area for 1 second after placement. When an enemy champion or large monster enters range, the volcano erupts, launching a thick lava blast that deals magic damage every second. Each volcano can be destroyed with 3 basic attacks. While inside his Domain (R), volcanoes can be placed without cooldown.

eruption.trigger: Enemy champion or large monster enters range

destruction.restriction: Does not trigger on minions or small jungle monsters

domainMastery.effect: While in Domain (R), place without cooldown or energy cost

h4.name: Domain Expansion: Iron Coffin Mountain
h4.description: Jogo targets an enemy champion, pulling both into a sealed molten Domain resembling the inside of a volcano. Inside, time slows, terrain is closed off by walls, and Jogo gains unrestricted volcanic control. The target cannot leave for 8 seconds unless Jogo dies.

volcanoControl.effect: Place Mini Volcanoes anywhere on walls

lore:
Jogo is a powerful high-grade cursed spirit born from humanity's deep-rooted fear of natural disasters, especially volcanoes. Proud and fanatical, he believes cursed spirits are the true heirs of Earth and sees humans as weak impostors occupying a world they don't deserve. His overwhelming confidence often blinds him, but beneath it lies immense destructive potential.

Driven by a vision of a new world ruled by cursed spirits, Jogo aligns himself with other powerful entities in the shadows, scheming to awaken chaos and erase humanity. His volcanic power manifests in explosive bursts, relentless flames, and searing terrain that mirror the raw fury of nature itself.

Despite his arrogance, Jogo possesses a dangerous intellect and unwavering resolve. In battle, he unleashes merciless flames and manipulates the battlefield with calculated brutality—especially when he traps his enemies inside his deadly Domain: the burning core of Iron Coffin Mountain.
